name: O'Neil — CAN SLIM
description: Earnings + leadership + new high + RS — adapted to Stockbit's EPS Rating / RS Rating fields.

rules.name: eps-rating-high
rules.expr: eps_rating is not None and eps_rating >= 80

rules.name: rs-rating-high
rules.expr: rs_rating is not None and rs_rating >= 80

rules.name: leader-not-laggard
rules.expr: ret_3m_pct is not None and ret_3m_pct >= 0
